chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3992 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hg of main case 09.09.2024. Mr. Shahnawaz, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Hakim Ali Shaikh, Addl. Advocate General. Mr. Abrar Ali Khichi, Addl. Prosecutor General. I.O. seeks time to determine the age of petitioner No. 1 as her father has stated in the FIR that she is 14/15 years of age. Petitioner No. 1, however, has denied to have been abducted by petitioner No. 2. In view of the above, if in the medical examination, she is not found to be 18 years of age, the case may be referred to the relevant Court under the Sindh Child Marriage Restraint Act and not under section 365-B, PPC. However, if she is found 18 years or more than 18 years, the case then shall be disposed of under ‘C’ Class and such report be submitted before the concerned Magistrate. In view of the above, this petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
